title: taraxacum gotlandicum
intro: Taraxacum gotlandicum, also known as Gotland dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the Swedish island of Gotland and similar habitats in other parts of the world. It is often used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and kidney issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as a natural diuretic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Taraxacum gotlandicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
